{{Infobox character
| name = Valketh
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]] is the [[Mist Sage]] and was formerly of [[House Wylan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]] tested [[Reigan Shen]]'s aptitude and suggested he would eventually advance to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]]'s eyes fill with dark mist.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]] is a [[Mist Sage]] with the base strength of an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
